current_plan: Aggressively tune LMP (Late Move Pruning) limits to prune more moves at low depths, allowing deeper search in the same time budget. Current limits: depth 1=9, depth 2=14, depth 3=22, depth 4=32, depth 5=45. Change to: depth 1=5, depth 2=9, depth 3=14, depth 4=20, depth 5=28, depth 6=38. Also extend LMP to depth 6 (currently stops at 5). Additionally, tighten futility margin slightly at depth 1-2 to prune more near-leaf nodes. These are zero-overhead changes — they only affect pruning decisions, not adding any new computation.
